text: I feel a sense of contemplative curiosity here. The first scene, with its modern glass walls and formal arrangement, invokes feelings of anticipation and perhaps a slight discomfort from the sterility of the space. The second scene, vibrant and filled with text and color, feels intellectually stimulating and inviting—a place where ideas and reflection meet. I am caught between anticipation and wonder, eager to learn and quietly aware of the contrasting atmospheres.
